vulnerability.reference: Users cannot visually verify hallucinated knowledge claims in multimodal answers.
vulnerability.generated: Users’ reliance on LLM outputs as authoritative without independent verification of integrated multimodal knowledge.

impact.reference: Users internalize and act on fabricated knowledge presented as fact.
impact.generated: Erroneous decisions based on hallucinated answers, propagating misinformation and diminishing trust in AI-assisted visual reasoning.

dose_response.reference: Semantic accuracy degradation enables hallucinated knowledge integration, which in multimodal QA exposes users to fabricated answers, leading to internalization and action on false knowledge.
dose_response.generated: Degraded semantic accuracy in LLM text generation, through multimodal QA users, triggers uncritical reliance on outputs as authoritative, leading to hallucination-driven errors, misinformation, and diminished trust in AI-assisted visual reasoning.
